metadata.name: kombify-StackKits
metadata.purpose: CUE-defined infrastructure blueprints, CLI, API, release bundles, and OSS website source for StackKit deployments.

upstream.contract: Root architecture manifest validates against the central Kombify architecture schema.

upstream.purpose: Internal registry snapshot source for release builds
upstream.contract: When STACKKIT_ADMIN_ENDPOINT is set, release jobs fetch /api/v1/sk/registry/snapshot; otherwise builds use an embedded CUE snapshot.

upstream.purpose: Self-hosted subdomain registration and heartbeat API
upstream.contract: StackKit registration flows call https://kombify.me/_kombify/api/v1 with X-Kombify-API-Key for subdomain and service exposure.

downstream.purpose: Control plane consumes StackKit catalog, validation, generation, logs, and backup controller surfaces
downstream.contract: kombify-Techstack calls stackkit-server endpoints and integrates the backup controller release artifact.

downstream.purpose: Public edge route for StackKits API and Direct Connect traffic
downstream.contract: Gateway exposes the production API route described by the StackKits OpenAPI document.

downstream.purpose: Curated public OSS mirror and CLI release target
downstream.contract: scripts/sync-public.sh mirrors curated OSS-safe source to github.com/kombifyio/stackKits before public release.

system.title: StackKits System Context
system.mermaid:
C4Context
    title StackKits System Context
    Person(operator, "Operator", "Runs StackKit deployments")
    System(stackkits, "kombify-StackKits", "CUE-defined infrastructure blueprint system")
    System_Ext(techstack, "kombify-Techstack", "Control plane and Admin registry")
    System_Ext(gateway, "kombify-Gateway", "Public API edge route")
    System_Ext(kombifyme, "kombify-Me", "Subdomain registration and heartbeat API")
    System_Ext(publicmirror, "kombifyio/stackKits", "Curated OSS mirror")
    Rel(operator, stackkits, "Initializes, validates, generates, and applies blueprints", "CLI")
    Rel(techstack, stackkits, "Consumes catalog, validation, generation, logs, and backup surfaces", "REST/OpenAPI")
    Rel(gateway, stackkits, "Routes production API traffic", "HTTPS")
    Rel(stackkits, techstack, "Fetches registry snapshots during internal release builds", "REST")
    Rel(stackkits, kombifyme, "Registers self-hosted domains and service routes", "REST")
    Rel(stackkits, publicmirror, "Publishes OSS-safe source and release artifacts", "GitHub Actions/GoReleaser")

containers.title: StackKits Containers
containers.mermaid:
C4Container
    title StackKits Containers
    Person(operator, "Operator")
    System_Ext(techstack, "kombify-Techstack")
    System_Ext(gateway, "kombify-Gateway")
    System_Boundary(stackkits, "kombify-StackKits") {
        Container(cli, "stackkit CLI", "Go/Cobra", "Deployment lifecycle and operator workflows")
        Container(api, "stackkit-server", "Go net/http", "Catalog, validation, generation, logs, and OpenAPI")
        Container(blueprints, "CUE blueprints", "CUE", "Base schema, kits, modules, addons, and platform contracts")
        Container(engine, "Generation engine", "Go + CUE", "Validates specs and renders OpenTofu variables/artifacts")
        Container(backups, "Backup binaries", "Go", "Host backup agent and controller")
        Container(website, "stackkit.cc source", "Node static build", "Lightweight OSS landing page and CLI docs")
        Container(workflows, "Release workflows", "GitHub Actions/GoReleaser", "Binaries, server image, OSS sync, and validation")
    }
    System_Ext(target, "Target Docker hosts", "Docker/OpenTofu")
    Rel(operator, cli, "Runs")
    Rel(techstack, api, "Calls", "REST")
    Rel(gateway, api, "Routes", "HTTPS")
    Rel(cli, blueprints, "Reads and writes")
    Rel(api, blueprints, "Discovers and serves")
    Rel(cli, engine, "Invokes")
    Rel(api, engine, "Invokes")
    Rel(engine, target, "Generates and applies infrastructure", "OpenTofu/Docker")
    Rel(workflows, cli, "Builds and releases")
    Rel(workflows, api, "Builds server image")
    Rel(workflows, website, "Publishes source with repo mirror")

components.title: StackKits Core Components
components.mermaid:
C4Component
    title StackKits Core Components
    Container_Boundary(cliapi, "CLI and API internals") {
        Component(commands, "cmd/stackkit/commands", "Go/Cobra", "Operator command surface")
        Component(apiserver, "internal/api", "Go net/http", "HTTP route handlers, auth, CORS, rate limits, and logs")
        Component(config, "internal/config", "Go", "StackKit and spec loading")
        Component(cuebridge, "internal/cue", "Go + CUE", "Schema validation, module extraction, and generation bridge")
        Component(composition, "internal/composition", "Go", "Module graph resolution and tfvars generation")
        Component(iac, "internal/iac + internal/tofu + internal/terramate", "Go", "OpenTofu and Terramate execution adapters")
        Component(identity, "internal/identity + internal/pocketid", "Go", "Owner and break-glass provisioning")
        Component(kombifyme, "internal/kombifyme", "Go", "kombify.me registration client")
        Component(registry, "internal/registry", "Go", "Admin API or embedded registry snapshot")
        Component(servicecatalog, "internal/servicecatalog", "Go", "Canonical service catalog")
    }
    Container_Ext(cuefiles, "CUE source tree", "base, kits, modules, addons")
    Container_Ext(target, "Target Docker hosts", "Docker/OpenTofu")
    Rel(commands, config, "Loads specs")
    Rel(commands, cuebridge, "Validates and exports")
    Rel(commands, composition, "Resolves selected modules")
    Rel(commands, iac, "Plans and applies")
    Rel(apiserver, config, "Loads catalog")
    Rel(apiserver, cuebridge, "Validates requests")
    Rel(apiserver, composition, "Generates previews and tfvars")
    Rel(cuebridge, cuefiles, "Reads")
    Rel(composition, servicecatalog, "Uses")
    Rel(identity, target, "Provisions identity artifacts")
    Rel(kombifyme, target, "Registers reachable services")
    Rel(registry, cuebridge, "Bakes fallback snapshot")
    Rel(iac, target, "Executes")

features.name: CUE Blueprint Source Of Truth
features.businessCapability: Define infrastructure kits, modules, addons, platform contracts, and settings as versioned CUE source.

codeModules.responsibility: Shared foundation schemas and deployment constraints
Atomic service module contracts and compose references

features.name: CLI Deployment Lifecycle
features.businessCapability: Initialize, prepare, validate, generate, plan, apply, inspect, and remove StackKit deployments.

codeModules.responsibility: CUE validation, extraction, and generator bridge
Module graph resolution and tfvars generation

features.name: API Control Plane Contract
features.businessCapability: Expose StackKit catalog, schema, validation, generation, logs, and OpenAPI metadata to platform consumers.

codeModules.responsibility: HTTP API process and server configuration
REST routes, middleware, auth, CORS, rate limits, and log streaming
Public OpenAPI contract for StackKits consumers
Admin API snapshot client and embedded OSS registry data

features.name: Identity And Security Deployment
features.businessCapability: Provision local owner, break-glass access, identity services, ingress auth, and secure service defaults.

codeModules.responsibility: Identity schema and baseline service constraints
PocketID API client for owner provisioning

features.name: kombify.me Direct Connect
features.businessCapability: Register deployed StackKit instances and service URLs with kombify.me for self-hosted access.

codeModules.responsibility: Network context and public IP detection

features.name: Backup Operations
features.businessCapability: Ship host backup agent and backup controller components for StackKit-managed environments.

codeModules.responsibility: Backup controller entrypoint and API host
Backup controller server, queue, store, audit, and scheduler
Backup addon CUE contract and database hooks

features.name: Release Website And OSS Sync
features.businessCapability: Build release binaries, server image, static website source, and the curated OSS public mirror.

codeModules.responsibility: CI, validation, release, image build, and public sync workflows
CLI, kit archive, backup agent, and backup controller release configuration
StackKit CLI and API server container image
